name: Montego Bags O' Wags Mega Marrow Bone - 10 x 1
shortDescription: Highly nutritious, wagtastically delicious, BAGS O’ WAGS Megachews are the super-sized treats dogs love to get and they’re big on fun and goodness! A chewmungous bone with a soft, meaty centre! These tasty treats are ideal as a delicious reward when training (or whenever!)
description: Ingredients: Corn starch, poultry meal, water, glycerine, milk powder (lactose reduced), propylene glycol, wheat gluten, sugars, chicken fat, sodium hexametaphosphate, spray-dried animal plasma, sodium tripolyphosphate, fish oil, carrageenan. Additives: SENSORY: White and brown colour; palatability meat-based enhancers with beef flavour; Preservatives: Potassium sorbate. Typical Analysis: Crude protein: 15% | Moisture: 16.5% | Total fat: 5.5% | Crude fibre: 1% | Sodium: 5% | Metabolisable energy: 342 kcal/100 g
